creator: r.quakkelaar@quaras.nl
text:
When using option AUTH_MYSQL=on (also in port mail/courier-imap) a forced install of databases/mysql80-client is now attempted.

But this conflicts with databases/mariadb1011-client which I am running.

BTW I had databases/courier-authlib-mysql installed without the mysql80-client and since I aborted the recompile it still works with mariadb.

This problem arose after doing a recompile of all dependent ports following the forced upgrade of perl5-5.34 to perl5-5.36

list of relevent ports involved in above mentioned perl5 upgrade here:
mail/courier-imap
databases/courier-authlib-mysql
devel/sysconftool
security/courier-authlib
security/courier-authlib-base
